error_signature: button that triggers the workflow is disabled
title: Button triggering workflow is disabled
symptom: The button intended to trigger the workflow does not initiate any action when clicked, and no calls are recorded in Xano.
applies_when: Button is configured to trigger a workflow
not_this_if: Button is enabled and configured correctly
root_cause: The button may have been inadvertently set to a disabled state, preventing any action from being triggered when clicked. This can occur during the design phase if the button's properties are not properly configured.
fix_steps: Locate the button in the project settings
Save the changes and test the button again
agent_instruction: Ensure the button is enabled by toggling the 'Disabled' option to 'off'.
